events.name: Cleveland Cavaliers at Oklahoma City Thunder

highlights.headline: Thunder snap Cavs' 7-game winning streak
highlights.description: The Thunder down the Cavs at home, halting Cleveland's seven-game winning streak.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Thunder snap Cavs' 7-game winning streak) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Isaiah Joe scored 22 points and Cason Wallace added 20 points and 10 assists to help the short-handed Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 121-113 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Short-handed Thunder hit 21 3s to beat Cavaliers 121-113, snapping Cleveland’s 7-game streak

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Thunder snap Cavs' 7-game winning streak) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jalen Johnson had 26 points and 12 rebounds and the Hawks rallied from an 11-point fourth-quarter deficit to beat Brooklyn 115-104 on Sunday for the Nets fourth straight loss.

events.name: Denver Nuggets at Golden State Warriors

highlights.headline: The short-handed Warriors knock off the Nuggets at home
highlights.description: The Warriors take down the Nuggets at home without Steph Curry, Draymond Green and Kristaps Porzingis.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (The short-handed Warriors knock off the Nuggets at home) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Brandin Podziemski scored 12 of his 18 points in the final five minutes of the fourth quarter and the Golden State Warriors beat the Denver Nuggets 128-117 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Podziemski's late scoring leads Warriors to a 128-117 win over the Nuggets
